task: Find the online booking page for Park Vets in Chislehurst and return the next 3 soonest available appointment slots (date + time). Start with web_search, then http_fetch the booking page. The booking is a multi-step JavaScript widget (Vetstoria), so the times are not in the static HTML: use the `browser` tool to drive it step by step — open the booking page, then act/read to choose the Chislehurst location and work through the wizard (new client, species, a consultation appointment type, then Next) until the calendar of dates appears. The dates are a horizontal strip; the controls show each date's state (e.g. "Wed Jun 24 — Wednesday June 24th is available"). Click an AVAILABLE date (not one marked not available) to load its times — the times then appear in the page; READ them. Do NOT click a time slot — clicking a time advances to booking; you only need to READ the times. Collect the 3 soonest times starting from the earliest available date, moving to the next available date if one has fewer than 3, pairing each time with its date (a slot is a date + a time — never a bare time). Report each date EXACTLY as the calendar shows it (e.g. "Wed Jun 24"); do not convert it to another format or add a year the page does not display, so the value can be verified against the page. Read the visible times directly; do not dig through raw API JSON. Read the page after each step and react — if action_error comes back, the selector missed, so look at the returned text and try another. On a form step, fill EVERY required field before clicking Next; for an option that appears many times (e.g. a number-of-pets 1/2/3 button), use a click with "near" set to the field's label so the closest matching control is chosen. If a cookie/consent dialog appears and blocks interaction, dismiss it FIRST (click its accept/agree/got-it button) before continuing. Stay in ONE browser session — do NOT close and reopen it (reopening resets cookies and wastes steps); keep acting/reading in the same session until you reach the times. Return ONLY the 3 slots — each a date + a time that actually appear in what you retrieved; never guess a time. Once you have 3, finalise — do not re-verify or reopen.

args.query: Park Vets Chislehurst book appointment Vetstoria
